text: Thank you for calling Mountain View Plumbing. How may I help you? Hi, I just wanted to take a shower before work and realize I have no hot water. I think my water heater stopped working. I bought it from you guys five years ago, so I'm hoping it's still under warranty. I'm sorry to hear that. No hot water is never a great way to start the day. Thankfully, if your water heater is only five years old, it should still be under warranty. Just a few quick questions so I can help get the right technician to you as quickly as possible. Are you the homeowner or the person responsible for the property? Yes, it's my house. Great. Do you have easy access to where the water heater is located? Yeah, it's in my basement. Do you know the brand of your hot water heater? Yeah, it's a Rheem. Could you tell me the model name of the unit? That will help us bring the right parts. Yeah, it's labeled Rheem Performance Platinum. Rheem Performance Platinum, noted. Thank you. Can I get your full name, please? It's Ryan Whitmore. Thanks, Ryan. Is the number you're calling from? 510-738-2146. The best way to reach you? Yes. One question. Do you guys charge extra for same-day appointments? Same-day appointments are available at no extra charge during normal business hours, 9 to 5. If after-hour service is required, you will be notified of additional fees before scheduling. Great. How long do these diagnostics usually take? I'll need to notify my boss at work. Most diagnostic appointments take 30 to 60 minutes, depending on the issue. If a full repair is needed, the technician will let you know the estimated time and cost on-site. Okay, that's fine. Do I need to be home the whole time? We do recommend that someone over the age of 18 is present during the service window. Okay, that's no problem. Let me check how soon we could get a technician to you. What is your zip code? It's 94544. Great. The earliest we have available is today at 2 p.m. Does that work for you? Yeah, let's do 2 p.m. You got it. Finally, what's the street address for your house? It's 27468 Mission Hills Drive in Hayward, California. Great. You're all set for 2 p.m. today. A text confirmation will be sent shortly, including the direct phone number for your technician. If anything changes, just give them a call. Thanks again. We'll see you this afternoon.
